translations.fr: Je suis tout à fait pour.
translations.hi: मैं इसके पूरी तरह से पक्ष में हूँ।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate; present tense, 1st person singular.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate complement.
Pronominal adverb ('für + das'), functioning here as predicate complement meaning alignment/approval toward a previously mentioned proposition.

translations.en: I'm paying ten euros for it.
translations.fr: Je paie dix euros pour ça.
translations.ru: Я заплачу за это десять евро.
translations.he: אני משלם על זה עשרה אירו.
translations.vi: Tôi trả mười euro cho cái này.
translations.ar: أنا أدفع عشرة يورو مقابل هذا.
translations.nl: Ik betaal er tien euro voor.
translations.uk: Я плачу за це десять євро.
translations.hi: मैं इसके लिए दस यूरो दे रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg betaler ti euro for det.
translations.id: Saya membayar sepuluh euro untuk ini.
translations.sv: Jag betalar tio euro för det.
translations.da: Jeg betaler ti euro for det.
translations.ja: これに10ユーロ払います。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; denotes the act of paying.
Cardinal numeral specifying the amount.
Currency unit noun; direct object measured by the numeral.
Pronominal adverb referencing the beneficiary/target ('für + das') of the payment; adverbial complement to the verb.

translations.en: She has no time for that.
translations.fr: Elle n'a pas le temps pour ça.
translations.ru: У неё на это нет времени.
translations.pt: Ela não tem tempo para isso.
translations.vi: Cô ấy không có thời gian cho việc đó.
translations.nl: Ze heeft daar geen tijd voor.
translations.uk: У неї на це немає часу.
translations.hi: उसके पास उस काम के लिए समय नहीं है।
translations.nb: Hun har ikke tid til det.
translations.id: Dia tidak punya waktu untuk itu.
translations.sv: Hon har inte tid för det.
translations.da: Hun har ikke tid til det.
translations.ja: 彼女にはそれをする時間がありません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject in nominative. Ambiguous between 'she' (3sg fem) and formal 'you' (2sg/2pl) depending on context.
Main verb expressing possession; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Negative determiner agreeing with the noun; here feminine singular accusative, negating the NP.
Noun; direct object of 'hat' indicating the resource possessed/not possessed.
Pronominal adverb ('für + das') specifying what the time would be for; adverbial complement to the predicate.

sentences.target: Wir sparen dafür jeden Monat etwas.

translations.de: Wir sparen dafür jeden Monat etwas.
translations.en: We save a bit for it every month.
translations.es: Ahorramos un poco para eso cada mes.
translations.fr: On met un peu d'argent de côté pour ça chaque mois.
translations.it: Ogni mese mettiamo da parte un po' di soldi per questo.
translations.ko: 우리는 그걸 위해 매달 조금씩 저축해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们为此每个月攒一点钱。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗呢樣嘢每個月儲少少錢。
translations.ru: Мы откладываем на это понемногу каждый месяц.
translations.pt: Economizamos um pouco para isso todo mês.
translations.he: אנחנו חוסכים לזה קצת בכל חודש.
translations.tr: Bunun için her ay biraz biriktiriyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để dành một ít cho việc đó mỗi tháng.
translations.ar: हम इसके लिए हर महीने थोड़े पैसे बचाते हैं।
translations.nl: We sparen er elke maand een beetje voor.
translations.uk: Ми щомісяця відкладаємо на це трохи грошей.
translations.hu: Minden hónapban félreteszünk rá egy keveset.
translations.hi: हम इसके लिए हर महीने थोड़े पैसे बचाते हैं।
translations.pl: Co miesiąc odkładamy na to trochę pieniędzy.
translations.el: Αποταμιεύουμε λίγα χρήματα για αυτό κάθε μήνα.
translations.nb: Vi sparer litt til det hver måned.
translations.id: Kami menabung sedikit untuk itu setiap bulan.
translations.sv: Vi sparar lite till det varje månad.
translations.ro: Economisim puțin pentru asta în fiecare lună.
translations.cs: Každý měsíc na to trochu šetříme.
translations.da: Vi sparer lidt op til det hver måned.
translations.fi: Säästämme sitä varten joka kuukausi λίγo.
translations.ja: それのために毎月少しずつ貯金しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject.
Main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; denotes putting aside resources.
Pronominal adverb indicating the purpose/goal of saving ('für + das'); adverbial modifier.
Determiner, accusative singular masculine agreeing with 'Monat'; forms a temporal adverbial ('every month').
Noun; head of the temporal accusative phrase specifying frequency.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as an unspecified object/amount saved.

We save a bit for it every month.
